title: Yeast Citrus Velveteen
description: A citrusy and velvety one-pot Kenyan dish featuring instant yeast cooked in a keto-friendly manner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat.
Add diced onion and minced garlic; sauté until softened.
Stir in tomato puree, lemon zest, lime juice, salt, and black pepper. Let it simmer for about 5 minutes.
Crush the instant yeast into a small bowl with water to activate (let sit for at least 10 seconds).
Pour the activated yeast solution over the onion mixture and stir well to combine.
Simmer for another 2-3 minutes until thickened slightly, stirring occasionally.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course. Garnish with chopped cilantro if desired.
